title: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
summary_full: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
summary_public: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.

HU.label: neutral
